# CCP PowerPoint Presentation Generator

**Cloud-Enabled Distributed Matrix Multiplication Framework - Automated Presentation Generator**

- **Student**: Muhammad Junaid Sajjad
- **Roll No**: Fall 23 BSCS 054
- **Course**: Parallel & Distributed Computing
- **Instructor**: Miss Amina Nadeem
- **University**: Lahore Garrison University (LGU)
- **Date Generated**: 2026-05-19

---

## 📋 Quick Start

```bash
# 1. Navigate to the ccp_ppt folder
cd ccp_ppt

# 2. Install dependencies
npm install

# 3. Generate presentation
npm start

# 4. Open the generated file
CCP_Term_Project_Presentation.pptx
```

---

## ✅ Output

When you run `npm start`, you'll see:

```
🎬 === CCP POWERPOINT GENERATOR ===
🚀 Starting presentation generation...
📝 Generating icons from React components...

✅ Icons generated successfully
📋 Building all 35 slides...

  [1/35] Slide 1: Cover Slide
  [2/35] Slide 2: Presentation Roadmap
  [3/35] Slide 3: Content Slide
  ...
  [35/35] Slide 35: Thank You

💾 Writing PowerPoint file to disk...

======================================================================
✅ SUCCESS! PRESENTATION GENERATED SUCCESSFULLY! ✅
======================================================================

📊 PRESENTATION DETAILS:
   📄 File Name: CCP_Term_Project_Presentation.pptx
   📁 Location: /Users/YourName/ccp_ppt/CCP_Term_Project_Presentation.pptx
   📑 Total Slides: 35
   🎨 Theme: Dark HPC (Professional Design)
   👤 Author: Muhammad Junaid Sajjad
   🏫 Institution: Lahore Garrison University
   📚 Course: Parallel & Distributed Computing (BSCS 054)
   🔧 Technologies: CUDA, OpenMP, MPI, Docker, AWS EC2

🏗️ FILE SIZE:
   2.45 MB

======================================================================

🚀 Your presentation is ready to download!
📮 Open the file in Microsoft PowerPoint or Google Slides

======================================================================
```

---

## 📊 Presentation Contents (35 Slides)

1. **Cover Slide** - Title with LGU branding
2. **Roadmap** - 8-section overview
3-34. **Content Slides** - Technical details for each section
35. **Thank You** - Closing slide with student info

---

## 🎨 Design Features

✅ Dark HPC theme (professional navy/black background)  
✅ Color-coded sections (Cyan, Green, Orange)  
✅ React Icons SVG-to-PNG conversion  
✅ University branding  
✅ Consistent typography and layout  
✅ Shadow effects and modern styling  

---

## 📦 Dependencies

- `pptxgenjs` - PowerPoint generator
- `react` & `react-dom` - Component rendering
- `react-icons` - Icon library
- `sharp` - Image processing

Install with: `npm install`

---

## 📁 Files Included

```
ccp_ppt/
├── package.json                              # Dependencies
├── ccp_ppt.js                               # Generator script
├── README.md                                # This file
└── CCP_Term_Project_Presentation.pptx       # OUTPUT (generated)
```

---

## 🎯 Technologies Covered

- **CUDA**: GPU matrix multiplication kernels
- **OpenMP**: Directive-based CPU parallelism
- **MPI**: Distributed matrix multiplication
- **Docker**: Containerization
- **AWS EC2**: Cloud deployment
- **Python/NumPy**: CPU baseline
- **pptxgenjs**: Presentation generation

---
